package rulecoverage

func PositiveS3GetobjectWithoutRange() string {
    ruleID := "s3_getobject_without_range"
    family := "library"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`s3.GetObject` downloading full objects when only partial data is needed (inferred from subsequent `io.LimitReader` or partial reads)"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
